data.body: S2 RED confirmed (right reason): 9 pass (FakeBackend reference-double params + RemoteRef equality — proves contract suite well-formed), 19 fail + 5 error (all JiraBackend/JiraIdentityConvention behavioral tests, NotImplementedError = behavior absent). Holding out oracle: test_backend_characterization.py (byte-for-byte), test_backend_identity.py (identity edges), test_backend_capability.py (capability detection) moved to job tmp. Implementer sees only: _backend.py (pinned interface), test_backend_contract.py (happy generic contract), backend_support.py (FakeBackend double), and the NotImplementedError stubs backend.py/identity.py to fill.
